name: ACCA WhatsApp Commerce Optimizer

response_rate.description: % of new conversations that get a bot reply within 60 seconds

acca_completion_rate.description: % of customers who receive all 22 ACCA steps

faq_deflection_rate.description: % of questions answered by bot without human handoff

sales_conversion_rate.description: % of ACCA-completed conversations that result in payment

avg_time_to_sale.description: Average minutes from first message to payment confirmed

cart_abandonment_rate.description: % of customers who showed interest but didn't pay

followup_recovery_rate.description: % of abandoned carts recovered via follow-up sequences

repeat_purchase_rate.description: % of customers who order again within 30 days

optimization_targets: ACCA message copy (test variants of each step)
Follow-up timing (test 1h vs 2h vs 4h cart abandonment)
Pricing presentation (test bundle vs single vs progressive)
Social proof placement (test reviews before vs after pricing)
CTA wording (test direct vs soft ask)
Voice message frequency (test more vs fewer voice messages)
Image quality and type (test product vs lifestyle vs testimonial)
